title: New View - Flowchart

posts.author: Matan_N (Matan Nice)
posts.cookedHtml: It would really helpful to have a view that presents tasks in a hierarchal flowchart style. This would be especially relevant for projects where priority or dependencies matter more than the timeline. Ideally this view would allow to place items on the board in a flexible manner (meaning they could be moved in both X and Y), and to connect arrows between all the items, including between multiple items (e.g. one item that depends on three others)
